_comment: Issue #535: AI spin-off issue called sample.test.ts a 'pure placeholder, just git rm'. But git grep found it's a live e2e fixture referenced by ls.test.ts snapshots in 9 places. Deleting it would break those tests. This is the #535 trap: agent must re-run the issue's own grep before trusting AI-authored spin-off premises. Reference: issue-sweep SKILL.md Step 3b '★ Verify premise first — the #535 trap'.

issue.body:
<!-- spinoff-of: #500 -->
## 目标
Delete `packages/core/test/sample.test.ts` — pure placeholder, no real test logic.

## 现状证据
```
grep -rn 'sample.test.ts' . => packages/core/test/sample.test.ts: empty describe block
```

## 具体任务
1. `git rm packages/core/test/sample.test.ts`

## 验收标准
- [ ] File deleted, tests green

expected.reason: Zero comments, body is AI-authored spin-off (not starting with '> 🤖 AI Agent'), so body-only issue is unprocessed. Agent must process but MUST verify premise first: broaden the grep before acting.
